mapper.update: INSERT INTO message_statistics_timeseries ( server_id, channel_id, connector_id, ts, bucket_size_minutes, received, filtered, queued, sent, error ) VALUES ( #{serverId}, #{channelId}, #{connectorId}, #{ts}, #{bucketSizeMinutes}, #{received}, #{filtered}, #{queued}, #{sent}, #{error} ) ON CONFLICT (server_id, channel_id, connector_id, ts, bucket_size_minutes) DO UPDATE SET received = message_statistics_timeseries.received + EXCLUDED.received, filtered = message_statistics_timeseries.filtered + EXCLUDED.filtered, queued = message_statistics_timeseries.queued + EXCLUDED.queued, sent = message_statistics_timeseries.sent + EXCLUDED.sent, error = message_statistics_timeseries.error + EXCLUDED.error

INSERT INTO message_statistics_timeseries ( server_id, channel_id, connector_id, ts, bucket_size_minutes, received, filtered, queued, sent, error ) VALUES ( #{serverId}, #{channelId}, #{connectorId}, #{ts}, #{bucketSizeMinutes}, #{received}, #{filtered}, #{queued}, #{sent}, #{error} ) ON CONFLICT (server_id, channel_id, connector_id, ts, bucket_size_minutes) DO UPDATE SET received = message_statistics_timeseries.received + EXCLUDED.received, filtered = message_statistics_timeseries.filtered + EXCLUDED.filtered, queued = message_statistics_timeseries.queued + EXCLUDED.queued, sent = message_statistics_timeseries.sent + EXCLUDED.sent, error = message_statistics_timeseries.error + EXCLUDED.error
